response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, or leadership scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people — critical gaps for a CTO role in high-stakes AI-driven fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven experience with event-driven systems, microservices, and real-time data (Dlang, streaming at Dunnhumby)
Strong open-source leadership and engineering culture contributions (GISCollective, workshops, testing tools)
concerns: No clear evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No mention of financial infrastructure domains (credit risk, working capital, compliance) or LLM evaluation/optimization pipelines
